usage_rules.text: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A) for high contrast text.
usage_rules.dashboard_bg: Use muted gray (#F8FAFC) for dashboard background, white (#FFFFFF) for cards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-sm shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-none hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-muted h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-wider text-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent h-10 px-4 rounded-none uppercase font-medium tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm rounded-none p-6
cards.feature: bg-muted/50 border border-border/50 p-8 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors rounded-none
cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border rounded-none hover:shadow-md transition-all

inputs.default: h-10 rounded-none border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: w-64 border-r bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 flex flex-col
navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded-none border-l-2 border-transparent hover:border-accent aria-[current=page]:text-white aria-[current=page]:bg-white/10 aria-[current=page]:border-accent

landing_page.features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 px-4 py-20

dashboard.header: h-16 border-b bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-8 sticky top-0 z-10

hero_bg.alt: Massive container ship traversing the ocean
hero_bg.usage: Landing page hero background with heavy dark overlay

logistics_context.usage: Importer dashboard empty states or promotional cards

network_abstract.usage: Subtle background pattern for Auth pages

universal_guidelines: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to maintain the industrial trade aesthetic.
Use 'Public Sans' for all body text and data tables.
Buttons must have sharp corners (rounded-none) and a 'hard shadow' on hover to feel tactile and precise.
Dashboards must use a sidebar layout with a dark navy background (#0F172A).
Forms must use the 'Shadcn' components but styled with square corners and high contrast borders.
Never use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Data tables should be dense (p-2 or p-3) to maximize information density for trade users.
Use the accent color (#F97316) sparingly - only for primary actions and critical alerts.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-performance B2B trade platform. The aesthetic is 'Swiss Industrial'. Think 'Bloomberg Terminal meets Maersk'. Prioritize information density, clarity, and speed. Do not use rounded corners generally; prefer sharp, technical lines. Use the provided image URLs for specific contexts. Ensure all forms are built using React Hook Form and Zod validation, styled with Shadcn UI components adapted to the 'square' aesthetic.
